# Echelon Analytics

> Privacy-first, self-hosted, cookieless web analytics. Single script tag, single SQLite database. AGPL-3.0.

## Overview

Echelon Analytics is a lightweight alternative to Google Analytics. It tracks pageviews, bounces, sessions, scroll depth, clicks, outbound links, file downloads, form submissions, Core Web Vitals, UTM campaigns, and A/B experiments — all without cookies by default.

Visitors are identified using a daily-rotating HMAC hash (IP + UA + site + date). No cross-day tracking, no cookie consent banners needed (GDPR/ePrivacy compliant). Optional persistent cookies via `data-cookie` attribute.

Bot traffic is filtered using a multi-layered system: known UA blocklist, WebAssembly proof-of-work challenges (rotated every 6 hours), heuristic scoring (0–100), Cloudflare integration, burst detection, and per-IP rate limiting.

Built with Deno, Fresh 2.2.0, Preact, SQLite (WAL mode), Tailwind CSS v4, and Vite 7.

## Quick Start

```
cd echelon-analytics
deno task dev
deno task test       # Run 214 server-side tests
deno task test:e2e   # Browser E2E tests (requires Chromium)
```

```html
<script src="https://your-host/ea.js" data-site="my-site"></script>
```

## Admin Dashboard

Full-featured admin UI at `/admin/` with:
- Live dashboard: Now gauge, 60-minute and 24-hour trend charts, recent visitors/events (auto-refreshes every 10s)
- Overview with KPIs, daily trends, top pages, devices, countries, referrers
- Visitor views listing — filterable, sortable, paginated with visitor detail pages
- Semantic events listing with type badges and filtering
- Bot management — suspicious visitors, exclude/include controls
- A/B experiments — create, manage, view conversion uplift
- UTM campaigns — track and break down by source, medium, content
- Performance metrics — CI/CD benchmark tracking with trends
- Norway-inspired professional design with navy and burgundy palette
- Configurable timezone display (`ECHELON_DISPLAY_TIMEZONE`)
- Persistent site selector and date range picker in navigation

## Documentation

- [Installation](https://ea.js.org/installation.html): Setup, Docker, reverse proxy, auth
- [Features](https://ea.js.org/features.html): Script attributes, JS API, auto-tracked events, SPA support, admin dashboard
- [API Reference](https://ea.js.org/api.html): REST endpoints for stats, live dashboard, campaigns, experiments, bots
- [Bot Defense](https://ea.js.org/bot-defense.html): PoW system, scoring factors, Cloudflare integration
- [Configuration](https://ea.js.org/configuration.html): All environment variables with defaults
- [Architecture](https://ea.js.org/architecture.html): Request flow, database schema, data pipeline, theming
- [Portable Data](https://ea.js.org/portable-data.html): SQLite schema, example queries, data lifecycle
- [MCP Server](https://ea.js.org/mcp.html): Model Context Protocol server for AI agent integration
- [Data Ownership & Open Access](https://ea.js.org/data-ownership.html): First-party data principles — no vendor lock-in, no sampling, full SQL access, AGPL-3.0
- [Telemetry](https://ea.js.org/telemetry.html): Opt-in anonymous admin usage data — what it collects, how to control it
- [Full Documentation for LLMs](https://ea.js.org/llms-full.txt): Complete reference in a single file

## Public Mode

Set `ECHELON_PUBLIC_MODE=true` for a read-only public dashboard — no authentication, all mutations blocked (403), internal stats redacted, mutation controls hidden in the UI. Telemetry and health endpoints remain open.

## Security

CSRF protection on cookie-authenticated mutations (Origin/Referer host matching). PoW nonce tracking prevents token replay. Response headers: CSP, X-Frame-Options: DENY, X-Content-Type-Options: nosniff. Session security: PBKDF2-SHA256, 24h TTL, 30-min idle timeout, login rate limiting.

## Anonymization

Sites in `ECHELON_ANONYMIZE_SITES` get deterministic anonymization: HMAC-hashed visitor IDs (daily key rotation), fictional planet names for countries, themed aliases for devices/OS.

## Testing

214 server-side tests + 14 browser E2E tests. Covers bot scoring, PoW, sessions, rate limiting, buffered writes, DB, stats, middleware (auth, CSRF, CORS, CSP), endpoints, public mode, and maintenance. Tests run before every tagged release.

## Public Dashboard

A live public instance is available at [ea.islets.app](https://ea.islets.app/admin). It runs in `PUBLIC_MODE` — fully read-only, no authentication required. All displayed data is anonymized (HMAC-hashed visitor IDs, fictional countries). The dashboard demonstrates every admin feature: realtime visitors, bot detection, A/B experiments, UTM campaigns, and performance metrics.

- Live dashboard: https://ea.islets.app/admin
- LLM-friendly description: https://ea.islets.app/llms.txt
- Sitemap: https://ea.islets.app/sitemap.xml

## Source

- Repository: https://github.com/janit/ea
